About

Senior Analyst.

"I don't just report what happened. I build systems that explain why — and point to what should happen next."

With a background in Information Technology and hands-on experience across multi-outlet F&B operations, ERP evaluation, and Python instruction, I combine technical depth with business fluency. I build reporting ecosystems — not individual dashboards.

Currently embedded at Emboss Burgers as their Data & Business Analyst, where I have architected the entire data intelligence layer: from live hourly ops reports powered by Claude AI, to delivery platform P&L analysis, menu engineering, and staff performance gamification.

Current Impact · Emboss Burgers

How I Grew a Restaurant Group's Revenue by 314% in 6 Months.

When I joined Emboss Burgers, there was no data infrastructure, no delivery platform strategy, and no visibility into hourly profitability. I built the entire intelligence system from the ground up — and the revenue followed.

01
Claude AI + Power BI MCP · Daily

AI-Powered Hourly Operations Report

Every day I generate a 12-page live operations report for all 3 branches — powered by Claude AI reading directly from Power BI via MCP. It breaks down every trading hour with profitability calculated after removing every real cost layer.

  • → Hour-by-hour: Sales, Food Cost %, Labour, Prime Cost %
  • → Delivery commission removed per platform per hour
  • → Card fee (0.80%) removed from Dine-in & Takeaway
  • → Food cost + Labour + Rent + Marketing deducted → Est. Contribution Profit
  • → Demand bands: Lean → Build-Up → Peak → Critical Peak per branch
Session Result · 24–25 Jun 2026
SAR 22,789 across 3 branches · 451 orders · Est. Contribution Profit: SAR 3,862 after all cost deductions
Executive Snapshot + Contribution Profit
Olaya — Hour-by-Hour P&L Table
Order Type Mix & Top Products
Menu Engineering Dashboard — Power BI
02
Boston Matrix · Product Strategy

Menu Engineering & Product Intelligence

Every product classified weekly as Star, Puzzle, Ploworse, or Dog — based on Contribution Margin and Sales Mix. This Power BI model directly drove the delivery revenue transformation from SAR 59K to SAR 500K in 5 months.

  • → Selling Price, Variable Cost/Unit, CM/Unit, CM% per product
  • → Sales Mix % and Total CM tracked — Stars promoted, Dogs removed
  • → Classic Beef: 73,868 units · Crispy Chicken: 34,803 units (Stars)
  • → Combo bundles engineered: Box 4 (SAR 542K) + Box 6 (SAR 413K)
Business Impact
Delivery platform revenue: SAR 59K (Dec 2025) → SAR 500K (Jun 2026) · 747% in 5 months
03
HungerStation · Keeta · Ninja · Jahez

Delivery Platform P&L — True Profitability by Platform & Branch

I built a financial model that strips every cost layer from delivery revenue to expose what the business actually keeps — branch by branch, platform by platform, with restaurant-funded offers separated from net revenue.

  • → Gross Sales (incl. VAT) per platform per branch
  • → Restaurant-funded offers deducted (not platform cost)
  • → Platform commission removed → Net Amount Received
  • → Food cost deducted from control dashboard (not just invoices)
  • → Final: Profit after Food Cost · per platform · per branch
April 2026 · All Platforms · All Branches
Gross: SAR 309,874 → Net after commissions: SAR 188,389 → Profit after food cost: SAR 114,432
Delivery P&L Report — April 2026 (Arabic)
KPI Report Cover — May vs June 2026
Delivery Platform Breakdown — All 4 Platforms
04
Monthly Intelligence · All Channels · All Branches

Monthly KPI Comparison Report — 12 Pages, Verified to the Last SAR

A same-period 21-day comparison report covering every channel and branch — reconciled against the live POS FactInvoice database. Management receives one verified source of truth, not guesses.

  • → June 2026: SAR 562,038 revenue · 10,700 orders · AOV SAR 52.53
  • → Delivery ▲27.1% · HungerStation ▲31.9% · Ninja ▲43.7% (strongest)
  • → Channel shift identified: Delivery absorbing Dine-in/Takeaway decline
  • → Grand total verified against FactInvoice DB — zero discrepancy
Strategic Finding
Correctly identified structural channel shift — delivery platforms (+27.1%) fully offset the decline in dine-in and takeaway.
05
Live Power BI · Staff Gamification

Sales Dashboard & Daily Branch Challenge System

Beyond analytics, I designed a daily inter-branch competition system that translates data into staff behaviour — tracking Combo Rate, Add-on Rate, and Drink Rate every session, with points, standings, and personalised coaching notes per branch manager.

  • → Live Power BI dashboard: SAR by product, day, hour with slicers
  • → June 2026: Masif leads with 173 pts after 24 sessions (19 wins)
  • → Daily champion declared · Monthly cumulative standings
  • → Personalised next-session targets sent to each branch manager
System Design
Rate beats volume — a branch serving 54 customers can outscore a branch serving 188, if their Combo/Add-on/Drink rates are higher.
Sales Dashboard — June 2026
Daily Branch Challenge — 24 Jun 2026
Olaya Branch Report — May 2026 · Highest Growth Branch
06
Branch Intelligence · Monthly Narrative

Branch Performance Reports — Olaya, Masif & Muruj

Each branch receives a monthly intelligence report — a data narrative that explains not just what happened, but why, and what to focus on next. These reports connect KPIs to real operational decisions.

  • → Olaya May: SAR 344.9K · +42.7% vs April · Highest growth in group
  • → Channel mix evolution: Takeaway 73% (Feb) → Delivery 52% (May)
  • → Top 5 products by SAR + units · Food cost trend · AOV movement
  • → 3 focus areas defined for next month with specific targets
Key Insight Identified
Delivery overtook Takeaway at Olaya for the first time ever in May 2026 — flagged as a structural shift, not a one-time event.
Day-to-Day Intelligence Work

What I Build, Every Single Day

Beyond the major projects, this is the operational intelligence layer I maintain daily — the systems that keep the business running with clear eyes.

📊
Branch Performance Reports
Monthly narrative reports per branch — Olaya, Masif, Muruj — with growth story, channel mix evolution, top product analysis, food cost trends, and specific focus areas for the following month. Olaya May 2026: SAR 344.9K, +42.7% growth, delivery overtook takeaway for the first time.
🏆
Staff Challenge & Gamification System
I designed a daily inter-branch competition tracking Combo Rate, Add-on Rate, and Drink Rate for dine-in & takeaway orders. Points system, daily champion declared, monthly standings maintained. After 24 sessions, Masif leads with 173 pts — system drives measurable upsell behaviour.
⚙️
ERP System Evaluation & POS Integration
Evaluating ERP systems to align accounting, inventory, and operational workflows with the Power BI reporting layer. Coordinating with POS vendors on API data flows, payment gateway reconciliation, and ensuring clean data pipelines from every channel into Res 2.
🔍
Food Cost Auditing — By Channel & Hour
Weekly audits of food cost by order type — delivery, dine-in, takeaway, employee meal, owner meal — tracked per branch. Flags raised when any hour exceeds 60% food cost threshold. April 2026: 33.9% overall food cost on SAR 5.75M total sales — within target.
📍
Google Business & Platform Management
Managing Google Business Profiles across all 3 branches — onboarding new outlets (Masif opened Jan 2026), maintaining delivery platform listings, optimising product photos and combos on HungerStation, Keeta, Ninja, and Jahez to support the menu engineering strategy.
💡
Offer Strategy & Rebranding Contributions
Designed the offer timetable — when dining and takeaway promotions run — to maximise outlet footfall during lean hours. Contributed to rebranding initiative and structured combo bundles (Box 4: SAR 542K, Box 6: SAR 413K in cumulative sales) as strategic revenue vehicles.
Projects

Selected Analytical Projects

Dashboards and tools built across tourism, education, and AI — demonstrating the same data-first thinking applied to different industries.

Tourism Analysis Dashboard

Interactive analytics dashboard visualising KPIs including tourist arrivals, hotel occupancy, and revenue trends. Integrated SQL queries for real-time reporting with advanced Power BI visuals to assist tourism boards in strategic decision-making.

Power BISQLExcel
College Academic & Placement Dashboard

Combined academic and placement data to track student performance with BRD-designed filters (Toppers, Backlogs, Attendance). Mapped placement trends by CGPA across companies including Wipro and TCS, enabling targeted student intervention.

Power BIPythonPandasJupyter
School Performance & Failure Insights

Analyzed 18,000+ students' academic data to identify failure rates by subject, gender, and board type. Drill-down dashboards exposed curriculum hotspots — 209 failures in Computers alone — and performed Root Cause Analysis for school management.

Power BIPythonExcelRCA
LLM-Based Resume Optimizer — GPT-Powered

Designed a GPT-powered tool to align resumes with job descriptions and improve ATS relevance. Built UI logic to extract job keywords, perform side-by-side prompt-based analysis, and enable early-career professionals to match roles with higher accuracy.

GPTPrompt EngineeringExcelPython
